blended.narrative: Killington is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
